octopus-with-artichokes-and-dill-argiro.name: Octopus With Artichokes And Dill
instructions: We start by putting the octopus first in a pot with wine and water just covering it.
Cover and simmer until it softens well.
Clean the artichokes, removing all their hard leaves.
Cut them into slices and add them to water with lemon.
Add the fresh and dry onions to a pan for 1-2 minutes.
Add the artichokes to Sauté.
Cut the octopus into pieces and add it to the pan along with all the remaining liquids in the pot.
Rub a lot of pepper, cover and let the food simmer for 15 minutes on low heat until its liquids are saved.
To the end of the boil sprinkle with the chopped dill.
Learn how to choose and how to cook the octopus properly for delicious foods.

old-fashioned-mixed-apple-pie.name: Old-fashioned Mixed-apple Pie

ingredients.prep: Pippin, and Golden Delicious), peeled, quartered, cored, cut into 1/2-inch-thick wedges

ingredients.item: Freshly grated nutmeg or ground nutmeg

instructions: Blend flour, sugar, and salt in processor. Add butter and shortening; cut in using on/off turns until mixture resembles coarse meal. Add 6 tablespoons ice water and blend just until moist clumps form, adding more ice water by teaspoonfuls if dough is dry. Gather dough into ball. Divide dough in half. Flatten each half into disk. Wrap in plastic and chill at least 3 hours.
DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled. Soften dough 15 minutes at room temperature before rolling out.

Butter 9-inch-diameter glass pie dish. Roll out 1 dough disk on lightly floured work surface to 12- to 13-inch round. Transfer dough to prepared pie dish and press dough onto bottom and up sides of dish, allowing overhang to extend over sides. Roll out second dough disk between sheets of parchment paper or waxed paper to 12- to 13-inch round; transfer dough to baking sheet. Refrigerate both crusts while preparing filling.

Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 218°C. Combine all apple wedges, 1/3 cup sugar, raisins, quick-cooking tapioca, grated lemon peel, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and nutmeg in large bowl; toss to blend. Let stand at room temperature until some juices form, tossing occasionally, about 15 minutes.

Place crust-lined pie dish on rimmed baking sheet. Sprinkle graham cracker crumbs over bottom of crust. Transfer apple filling to crust, mounding filling slightly in center. Dot filling with butter cubes. Brush crust edges lightly with water. Remove top parchment sheet from second dough round. Invert dough round atop filling; remove second parchment sheet. Trim dough overhang on both crusts to 1/2 inch. Press crust edges together, then fold under. Using tines of fork, press on crust edge around rim of dish to seal decoratively. Using small sharp knife, cut six 1-inch slits in top crust, then cut out 1/2-inch circle from center of top crust to allow steam to escape. Brush top crust lightly with milk, then sprinkle with raw sugar.

Bake pie 15 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 191°C and continue to bake pie until crust is golden, apples are tender when pierced, and juices are bubbling thickly through slits in crust, covering crust edges with foil collar if crust is browning too quickly, about 1 hour longer. Transfer pie to rack and cool to lukewarm or room temperature. Cut pie into wedges.

omelette-with-asparagus-argiro.name: Omelette With Asparagus
instructions: Remove the hard edges from the asparagus. With a peeling tool remove the fibers from their stem.
We wash them very well and drain them.
Boil water in a small pot and add salt.
We sink the asparagus whole if they are small or cut if they are large.
Boil for 2–3 minutes, until slightly softened, and drain.
Heat a medium pan and add the olive oil.
Sauté the asparagus for 1–2 minutes and add some salt.
Lower the heat to medium temperature and pour the asparagus with the beaten eggs.
Mix with spoon to combine the baked base with the liquid surface.
Bake for 3 minutes until the filling is stable.
Cover with a plate larger than the diameter of the pan and turn over.
Bake for 2 minutes on the other side until stabilized.
Finish on the grill for 3 minutes, so it will swell and brown.
Rub fresh pepper and serve the omelet with warm asparagus.
Optionally, add fresh cheese or cheese peels while still warm, to melt on the surface.

omelette-with-potatoes-argiro.name: Omelette With Potatoes
instructions: Heat the olive oil first in a pan over medium to strong heat.
Sauté the sauces for 2 minutes.
Add the onions, pumpkins and potatoes and sauce for 3-4 minutes until they grow.
Lower the intensity of the focus to medium to low.
In a bowl, beat the eggs with the wire.
Add the grated cheese and add salt and pepper.
Pour the beaten eggs into the pan.
Bake for 4 to 5 minutes.
Cover the pan with lid and turn over carefully.
Continue baking for 3 more minutes.
Serve with cool tomato salad.

one-hour-apricot-and-almond-galette.name: One-hour Apricot And Almond Galette

ingredients.prep: halved, pitted, or other stone fruit, quartered if large

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 425°. Pulse almonds and ⅓ cup sugar in a food processor until very finely ground. Add egg and pulse to combine. Add butter, almond extract (if using), vanilla extract, salt, and 1 Tbsp. flour; pulse until almond cream is smooth.
Roll out pastry on a lightly floured surface just to smooth out any creases.
If you’re using a package of pastry that has 2 sheets, stack and roll out to a ¼"–⅛"-thick rectangle.

If your package contains a single 16x10" sheet of puff pastry, halve it crosswise and roll out one half on a lightly floured surface until rectangle is ¼"–⅛" thick; save remaining half for another use. Transfer to a parchment-lined baking sheet. Fold over edges of pastry to make a ½" border around all sides. Prick surface all over with a fork (this keeps the pastry from rising too much when baked and helps it cook through). Spread almond cream over pastry, staying inside borders. (Chill dough in the freezer for a few minutes if it becomes too soft to work with.) Set apricots, cut sides up, on top of almond cream. Sprinkle lightly with sugar.

Bake galette until pastry is golden brown and puffed, 15–20 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 325° and continue to bake until pastry is deep golden brown and cooked through and apricots are softened and browned in spots, 15–20 minutes longer.
Do Ahead: Almond cream can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

one-pan-spicy-prawns-and-rice.name: One-pan Spicy Prawns And Rice
instructions: In a large pan, heat a drizzle of olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the onions, garlic, chile, and red pepper and sauté for about a minute, until starting to soften.
Add the chorizo and continue to cook for another minute or two.
Stir in the turmeric, salt, pepper, and rice.
Pour in the water, then cover and simmer for 20 minutes, until the rice is tender and the water has been absorbed.
Stir in the peas and prawns and cook until prawns are pink and no longer translucent, 3-4 minutes.
Enjoy!

one-pot-cajun-fettuccine-alfredo-pasta.name: One-pot Cajun Fettuccine Alfredo Pasta
instructions: In a small bowl, combine all spices for the cajun seasoning and mix together. Set aside. Store any extra in an airtight container for future use.
In a heavy bottom pot (such as a Dutch oven), heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced chicken and 2½ tablespoons of the prepared cajun seasoning.
Add the andouille sausage and cook until the chicken is no longer pink, about 4-5 minutes.
Remove the meat from the pot and add the remaining olive oil.
Add the garlic, diced peppers and onions and cook until the onions are transparent and softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the milk and stir so that the seasoning is incorporated into the liquid.
Turn the heat to high and bring to a boil.
Add the uncooked fettuccine, stirring constantly until the noodles are al dente, about 10 minutes.
On low heat, add the meat back in and stir so that it’s evenly incorporated.
Add the cheese and parsley, and stir. Remove from the heat.
Enjoy!

one-pot-chicken-and-mushroom-pasta.name: One-pot Chicken And Mushroom Pasta
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large pot on medium heat. Add chicken, salt and pepper, and brown - make sure to cook through. Set chicken aside.
Add 1 tablespoon olive oil and the onion into the pot and stir. Cook down for 1-2 minutes.
Add mushrooms and garlic, and stir to incorporate with the onion. Season with salt and pepper to taste as well as thyme and paprika. Stir to evenly season.
Add chicken broth and heavy cream to the pot and stir. Bring to a boil, then add the farfalle pasta.

Cook according to package instructions, being sure to stir every 1-2 minutes to keep the pasta from clumping together. (Cook time may be a little longer in this recipe than when the pasta is boiled in water.)
When the farfalle pasta is al dente, add the spinach and chicken and stir until the spinach cooks down and incorporates.
Add parmesan and stir until it’s well-incorporated and you’re left with a smooth sauce.
Top off with extra parmesan and serve.
Enjoy!

orange-celery-recipe-lezzet.name: Orange Celery Recipe

ingredients.item: Carrot (can be mixed alone or with time)
Tangerine juice (for a more aromatic flavor)
Freshly squeezed lemon juice (can be mixed with portakal water)
Walnut oil (andouml add flavor in presentations such as salad)
Sugar-free apple porridge (for sweetness and density)
Roka (can add several leaves in the service)

instructions: 1. Peel and cut down the peninsula, fine chop or reinde.
2. Takeaway timess into a large bowl, decide by adding lemon juice to the front.
3. Tighten the juice of oranges and prepare the fine grater of the shells.
4. Mix Wheat orange juice in a bowl, orange peel rendesi, olive oil, honey, salt and pepper thoroughly.
5. Mix the Health Saucers pour on and thoroughly.
6. The sauce of the peninsula is thoroughly veccedil; rest at 30 minutes in the refrigerator of internal
7. You can sprinkle fresh parsley on your service.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

oven-mouth-lezzet.name: Oven Mouth
instructions: 1. Draw tomatoes and peppers from the iri.
2. Extract and split the garlic into two.
3. Take Pirzolas on the tray, pour salt, pepper and olive oil on it and index to the tray.
4. Spread the pepper and garlic into the tray.
5. Cover the meat with tomatoes slices.
6. Fine chopped tail oil and salt sprinkle on tomatoes.
7. Preheated 200 degree bake meats until softening.
8. Serve hot.
9. Alternatively, you can try eggplant kebab recipe.
